summary: The narrator, Kim Hajin, emphasizes the strategic importance of building a connection with Yoo Yeonha, a powerful guild heiress, to advance his own story. He is placed on the same training team as Yeonha, along with Jin Hoseung and Hazuki. During their mission briefing to subdue a Blackhump Octopus, Yoo Yeonha takes charge, outlining a combat strategy that leaves Hajin feeling intentionally sidelined. Despite this, Hajin resolves to take initiative by luring the monster onto the beach as the mission commences.
key_moments: Kim Hajin underscores the critical need to gain Yoo Yeonha's attention for personal progression.
Hajin discovers he has been assigned to the same training team as Yoo Yeonha, Jin Hoseung, and Hazuki.
The team receives a mission briefing about a dangerous Blackhump Octopus, and Yoo Yeonha proposes a combat strategy.
Feeling excluded by Yeonha's plan, Hajin decides to take the initiative by luring the monster onto the beach.
